The JSRS Company Profile is an exhaustive Profiling system that doubles as your Company Website with independent URL. It contains a detailed Profile Management System that needs to be fully filled with all relevant Products & Services mapped to a detailed Catalogue Structure and other relevant information. 2

. Please note that the Call Centre Agents might sometimes be occupied due to online traffic, and you may need to wait. Agents can converse in Arabic and English. . The JSRS provides for unlimited Departments and unlimited Users to be configured within your company. 2. Login as Administrator and visit Enterprise Admin module and follow the process. 3. JSRS Compliance Documents List 1

. JSRS Compliance Documents List 1. The JSRS Certificate is issued after your company goes through a diligence process by businessgateways Certifications Department. As part of the process, you will be expected to upload information based on a standard checklist using the Supplier Validation Form (SVF). ''See list of Mandatory Documents Required here'' https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/undergoing-jsrs-certiﬁcation-process-23-2-2022 2

. In SVF some of the information is mandatory while others are optional. However, it is advised to maximize your document upload for faster resolution of Certification. Note: If there is any decline in the submission in the system, you need to update the documents or content as per the declined comments and submit the form again for validation

. JSRS Certification Site Visit Support The JSRS Site Visit is part of the Diligence process for JSRS Certification and is applicable ONLY to Omani Companies. International Companies are exempt from Site Visit. Note: The Online Site Visit option will be enabled only after the submission of the Supplier Validation Form (Tier 2). JSRS Certification Status Check 1. Login to JSRS

. JSRS Certification Status Check 1. Login to JSRS. On the Homepage Menu bar, under Quick Links click the listed JSRS Certificate to view & download your JSRS Certificate if it is issued to you. 2. You can view the Approved Products & Certificates by scanning the QR Code on your JSRS Certificate. 3. Once your Certificate is approved, you join the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) and you are eligible to download the JSRS Certified Suppliers Badge from the Dashboard

. You can use this on your mail signatures and Business Cards. Business Gateways Support Portal JSRS Fee Payment Support Steps to complete an Online Payment Here are the steps to complete an Online Payment: 1. Use your JSRS login credentials to access the JSRS Application. 2. On the Homepage, click Payment to download the Invoice. You will see all necessary details such as value, bank information, etc., 3. Choose Online Payment to pay through Oman Debit Cards or International Visa / MasterCard Credit Cards. 4

. 4. If you have any issues, please do not hesitate to raise a Support Ticket on JSRS Support System by sending an email to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support Ticket is an efficient way to track your resolution. We hope this was helpful. Steps to Upload Payment Proof Here are the steps to Upload Payment Proof: 1. Log in to the JSRS Application with your JSRS login credentials. 2. In the JSRS Dashboard click Payment & click on Bank Transfer. 3

. 3. Choose Upload Payment Proof to upload the Payment Success Screenshot and click on Confirm Payment. Please make sure the Payment Proof is a clear document. We hope this is helpful. JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) Welcome to the Connecting to Oman’s Procurement Action https://businessgateways.com/ JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) www.businessgateways

.businessgateways.com2 What is JSRS? The Joint Supplier Registration System (JSRS) is a 'single window' mandatory supplier registration and certification system implemented in 2014 by businessgateways on behalf of the Ministry of Energy & Minerals, Oman (previously known as Ministry of Oil & Gas) as an industry-wide procurement system. The JSRS Certification is a MANDATORY requirement for all Suppliers (National & International) wanting to connect with Oman’s Oil & Gas and other key Industries
. Who Utilizes JSRS? Operators, Other Industry Buyers and EPCs across Oman utilize JSRS for their ongoing procurement operations

. JSRS Buyers Community Organisations Contributing to Oman’s Pride & Procurement Oil & Gas Operators The JSRS invites National and International Suppliers (Contractors, Engineers, Manufacturers, Exporters, Agents, Consultants and Service Providers) from Oil & Gas, Construction, ICT, Agriculture, Food and Fisheries, Health, Logistics, Education and Manufactures and other Industries to be part of the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) and serve Oman’s Procurement requirements

. Oman’s Oil & Gas Procurement Potential Oman is the largest oil and gas producer in the Middle East that is not a member of the Organization of Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC). Oman’s proven natural gas reserves stand at approximately 677 billion cubic feet

. Rising natural gas production over the last several years has resulted in the expansion of natural gas-based industries, such as petrochemicals, power generation, and the use of natural gas as a feedstock for enhanced oil recovery projects. Oman continues its pursuit of economic diversification with procurement steadily growing to play a vital role in the field. Currently, the collective procurement spend of Oil & Gas Operators has crossed several billions of dollars

. With projects worth billions in sectors like Oil & Gas, Mining, Water, Electricity and Power, Oman is looking for Suppliers offering and specializing in top quality Products/Services, that adhere to world class best practices. To increase SME/LCC participation in local content-driven procurement activities, Oman pays a lot of attention to implementing proactive policies and investing towards skill development. Other Industry Buyers www.businessgateways

. Other Industry Buyers www.businessgateways.com3 Welcome to The JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) The heart of JSRS is its Oman-centric Certified Suppliers Network holding thousands of national and international Suppliers interested in specifically serving Oman’s Supply Chain

. This rich Supplier asset network known as JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) is the result of years of nonstop onboarding of the right mix of Suppliers, both from Oman and International communities by businessgateways. The JSRS Certified Suppliers have undergone strict validation process to be certified and be ‘Procurement Ready’ for the JSRS Buyers Community

. The JSRS CSN is a unique network consisting of thousands of best-of-breed credibility verified companies, playing an active role in the Procurement action in Oman. The JSRS CSN includes SMEs, LCCs and Large companies (both Omani and international), who are recognized based on their activities such as Manufacturers, Agents, Dealers, Consultants, Contractors and so on

. Through their profile on JSRS, Suppliers can showcase their Products & Services and connect to opportunities fostering Partnerships in Trade & Investment, Knowledge Transfer, and Export Operations. As a Certified Suppliers on the JSRS, you automatically join the JSRS CSN to stay connected with all the procurement action and opportunities of Oman’s Oil & Gas Operators, key Buyers from other industries and EPCs

. . They are further segmented into Industries, thereby supporting the ongoing procurement initiatives of the JSRS Buyers Community. Every company on the JSRS Network has their own independent Profile outlining their various credentials, business sector and what they do. 12% JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) Benefits of JSRS Certification JSRS Certification Process www.businessgateways

.businessgateways.com4 JSRS Certification Fee The JSRS Certification Fee is as per the Advisory of the Ministry of Energy & Minerals (previously known as Ministry of Oil & Gas) and is based on multiple criteria such as Classification and Certificate Validity period. Fee and Classification listed below are subject to change and you are advised to refer www.businessgateways.com for the latest information

. Contracts Management System (JSRS-CMS) Utilize an exhaustive Supplier Profile Management System that doubles up as a website, visible to the Buyers Community Foster trade and investment related B2B interactions between Omani and the International Business Communities via globeconnect Add all your Products/Services through our Services Catalog Management System which follows the UNSPSC structure Stay connected to ICV and SME Obligation initiatives from O&G Operators, Other Industries' Buyers and

from O&G Operators, Other Industries' Buyers and EPCs Connect with 1000s of companies via The Stage, online knowledge-sharing platform Subscribe to receive Open Tenders from across the GCC countries Gain Access to Market Intelligence Reports from leading publishers Apply for Additional Certifications specific to certain Buyers Note: Average Certi/f_ication duration is 2-3 weeks and validity of the JSRS Certi/f_icate is subject to Renewal

.businessgateways.com5 In-Country Value (ICV) Enabled The JSRS is a key enabler of Oman’s In-Country Value (ICV), supporting Omani Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME) and Local Community Contractor (LCC) with equal opportunities and enforcing spend transparency across strategic projects by prioritizing the Oman-First growth strategy

. The JSRS Certified Suppliers Network consists of thousands of MSMEs in addition to the Large Suppliers who have been classified and Certified as per the Ministry of Energy & Minerals, Oman. As a result, they are directly available for instant connectivity by the Buyers Community to drive and support their operational and strategic procurement operations such as ICV & SME Obligation Initiatives

. JSRS Contracts Management System (JSRS-CMS) The JSRS Contracts Management System (JSRS-CMS), is a one-stop platform integrating Supplier Sourcing, Response Management, Award Management & Tracking of entire project’s Supply Chain.. The JSRS-CMS is a special initiative by the Oman Ministry of Energy and Minerals, to offer Equal Opportunities to Omani SMEs & LCCs, during the process of dispersing ICV based Obligation Contract Awards

. ICV based SME/LCC Obligations As part of Oman’s In-Country Value (ICV) initiatives, the JSRS-CMS prioritizes SMEs and LCCs bidding engagements using the JSRS-CMS eTendering process, leading to Contract Awards. JSRS-CMS also connects the JSRS CSN to the multiple Sub-Contracting levels within the entire supply chain of certain O&G Projects to deliver SME / LCC Obligation Opportunities

. While the core objective of JSRS-CMS is to track and monitor Obligation Contracts awarded to Omani SMEs & LCCs, the JSRS-CMS also serves a deeper purpose in creating Transparency and Equal Opportunities, across the journey of ICV Obligation Contract Awards in Oman

. Additional Certifications (Post JSRS Certification) GCC Open Tenders An Opportunity to Grow Your Business in Oman and Other GCC Countries To add more value to JSRS Certified Suppliers, businessgateways offers GCC Open Tenders Service across ALL industries from the GCC countries of Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and UAE. Search for the right opportunities and explore those that interest your organisation, saving a lot of time while expanding your business interests

. JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) FAQs We are registered with some of the Operators in Oman. Do we still need to be registered on the JSRS? Yes. Since the launch of the JSRS and its Mandatory Certification requirement, all suppliers who have been previously registered with individual Operators are expected to be certified again on the JSRS to create the common pool of suppliers

. How soon can we be JSRS Certified? There is no fixed timeline and it entirely depends on the supplier readiness of required documents. The process generally takes around 2–3 weeks. Completion of the process depends on two factors such as completion of profile management and submitting all documents needed for JSRS Certificate validation and its approval. Omani Companies are subject to a Site Visit validation process by businessgateways team as part of the Certification approval process

. Is there a duration / expiry date on the JSRS Certificate? Yes, there is an expiry date on the JSRS Certificate depending on the duration of certification selected at the time of registration. JSRS Certificate duration for Omani suppliers is 3 years and for International suppliers is either for 1 year or 3 years. Suppliers need to ensure continuous validity of JSRS Certificate by Renewing on time

. Read more JSRS FAQs JSRS Registrations Department The JSRS Registrations team supports Suppliers on the JSRS Registration process. The JSRS Registration team is available from 8 AM to 5 PM (Oman). Suppliers can connect through varied mechanisms from Chat, Email, Call and WhatsApp. Contact Us Interested in joining the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network?: register@businessgateways

.com +968 9671 3467 (Oman) +91 74488 03311 (India) Follow JSRS on Social Media Stay connected with the latest O&G Project News, Business News, Events and Conference across the GCC Network by following: #BGIinsights Registration Hotline: www.businessgateways.com Scan code to visit our website: www.businessgateways.com Email Register at https://www.facebook.com/BGIinsights/ https://www.linkedin.com/company/business-gateways-international-llc/ https://www.instagram

Business Gateways Support Portal What next, after JSRS Certification? What other certificates can I apply for after receiving the JSRS Certificate? After receiving the JSRS Certificate, Suppliers can apply for Additional Certificates on JSRS. Additional Certificates are Buyer-Specific accreditation that suppliers can apply for to gain business opportunities in specific concession areas across Oman

. The Additional Certificate are categorized into two sections – LCC Special Status Certificates and Zonal Certificates. What is the LCC Special Status in JSRS Certificate? The ‘Local Community Contractor’ (LCC) Special Status is for companies operating within the concession areas of certain Operators. LCCs who meet specific criteria, as defined by these Operators, are identified on the JSRS Certificate as ‘Special Status’ LCC

. Companies with the LCC Special Status benefit from priority procurement opportunities from respective Operators. Omani Suppliers who qualify to be Local Community Contractors (LCCs) can apply for the LCC Special Status in their JSRS Certificate. LCC Special Status approval on the Certificate is currently endorsed by Petroleum Development of Oman (PDO), CC Energy Development S.A.L. (Oman Branch) and Occidental Oman Incorporated (OXY)

. What is PDO LCC JSRS Certificate? Petroleum Development Oman popularly known as PDO collaborated with JSRS on its Local CommunityContractors (LCC) initiative. Companies, wherein ALL the Owners are permanent residents (as per National ID)in any of the following Cities in Oman: Adam, Al Jazur, Bahla, Haima, Ibri, Muqshin, Shalim Al-HallaniyahIslands and Thumrayt, can apply for Special Status category

. The companies who successfully complete theirSpecial Status validation will be issued with the “PDO LCC” status on their JSRS Certification What is CCED LCC JSRS Certificate? CC Energy Development S.A.L. (Oman Branch) utilizes JSRS for its Local Community Contractors (LCC) initiative, as part of their commitment to the Companies from concession areas

. Any company, existing or new to JSRS, wherein all owners are permanent residents (as per National ID) in any of the specified concession area of CCED, can apply for the JSRS Certificate with LCC special status What is Occidental of Oman LCC JSRS Certificate? Occidental Oman Incorporated (OXY) has launched their Local Community Contractors (LCC) Certification asa ‘Special Status’ within JSRS Certification. The companies, whose owners are from seven specific Wilayats https://support

.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/what-next-after-jsrs-certiﬁcation (Haima, Al Duqm, Al Jazir, Mahout, Ibri, Adam and Bahla), are eligible for the Occidental OmanIncorporated LCC status in JSRS. JSRS Suppliers can apply for OXY LCC ‘Special Status’ on JSRS

. What is the primary advantage of having Additional Certification on JSRS? Does acquiring the JSRS Certificate alone mean that opportunities with Oil & Gas Operators will be limited? Apart from the JSRS Certificate, some Buyers require their Suppliers to hold an Additional Certification (issuedon fulfilment of that Buyer’s parameters) to be eligible for their procurement opportunities. In most cases, the JSRS is more than enough to receive business opportunities

. And in any case, it is a pre-requisite to receive any business opportunity from Oman’s O&G Sector. Kindly visit our page on Additional Certification on JSRS to know more Are there any additional fees required to register for Additional Certifications? No, as of now there are no additional fees required to register for Additional Certifications on JSRS. Kindly visit our page on Additional Certification on JSRS to know more. https://support.businessgateways
. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/what-next-after-jsrs-certiﬁcation

Business Gateways Support Portal Queries Related to PDO I do not hold a JSRS Certificate, can I till participate in tender opportunities floated by PDO? All vendors and Suppliers of Products & Services, who wish to do business with PDO, should be qualified by PDO. Interested Vendors and Suppliers (Local and Omani) must first acquire their JSRS Certificate, as it is a mandatory prequalification to PDO’s Vendor Registration. Kindly refer to this link to learn more: https://www.pdo.co

.pdo.co.om/en/Pages/BusinessWithPDO/VendorRegistration.aspx. I have my JSRS Certificate, how do I complete my PDO Vendor Registration? Kindly check the link provided to proceed with the PDO Vendor Registration: https://www.pdo.co.om/en/Pages/BusinessWithPDO/VendorRegistration.aspx

.aspx. Does inclusion to the AVME list in PDO require additional registration fee? Fees if any to join the PDO AVME, especially if PDO were to visit your Manufacturing facilities for an audit will be discussed with you by PDO. If you are certified Supplier, kindly refer to the link provided to learn about PDO and AVME: https://www.pdo.co.om/en/Pages/BusinessWithPDO/VendorRegistration.aspx

.aspx. Please be informed the JSRS Certificate is a pre-requisite to register as a vendor with PDO or any O&G Operator in Oman. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/queries-related-to-pdo

Business Gateways Support Portal JSRS Certification Validity, Expiry and Renewal Is there a duration/expiry date on the JSRS Certificate? Yes, there is an expiry date on the JSRS Certificate depending on the duration of certification selected at the time of registration. JSRS Certificate duration for National (Omani) Suppliers is 3 years and for International suppliers is either for 1 year or 3 years

. Are we required to keep our data updated after JSRS Certification? Yes, it is important that you update all critical data on your JSRS Profile regularly, as such data is usually monitored and brought to the notice of Oil and Gas Operators and Other Industry Buyers. How do we keep our data updated? To keep your data updated in JSRS: Log in to your profile. Navigate to the Master Company Profile / Supplier Certification Form(SCF) and edit the necessary information. Save your changes

. Save your changes. Submit for validation. Note: Regularly check and update your profile to ensure all information is Active. As an Omani company, how do we benefit under the ICV initiatives of JSRS? The JSRS was born to encourage equal opportunities under the ICV specially for Omani SMEs. ICV Compliance is a key component within the JSRS Certificate where parameters such as Omanisation is monitored regularly

. On the Contracts opportunities, the JSRS supports the SME/LCC Obligation Mandate for Buyer organisations who fall under this category by providing for SME/LCC Obligation Tracking through a Transparent and effective mechanism. https://support.businessgateways

. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal Refer also LCC/SME under JSRS Certification Process How do we get a notification about my JSRS Certificate expiry date? a) Regular reminder mails are sent before the expiry date. b) Your JSRS Certificate also reflects the valid until date. c) When you log in to your JSRS dashboard, a popup will notify about your JSRS Renewal

. How do we renew the JSRS Certificate? In the Subscription Alert/Account Settings – Subscriptions & Payments page on your dashboard, 1. Click the Renew option. 2. Fill the JSRS Certification Subscription Renewal Form. 3. Generate JSRS Certification invoice and make the payment (Online / Offline Payment Modes available). 4. Update and Submit the Supplier Certification Form (SCF) for renewal. 5. JSRS Certificate will be renewed after successful completion of the SCF Validation Process

. For National (Omani) Suppliers, Certification is also subject to the Classification Validation (SME/Large) of your Company at that point When should we renew the JSRS Certificate? a) The JSRS Certificate needs to be renewed before (or) on the expiry date. b) The Renewal Form is enabled throughout the Certification duration which enables suppliers to RENEW anytime

. c) On expiry, JSRS renewal continues to remain active for a grace period of 10 days following which the Subscription automatically terminates if it isn't renewed. What will happen if we do not renew our JSRS Certificate? The JSRS Certification is a mandatory requirement by the Oman Ministry of Energy and Minerals in order to connect with the procurement opportunities from the Oil & Gas Industry and Other Industries in Oman. Consequences of Suppliers holding Expired JSRS Certificate are: 1

. Exclusion from the ‘Active’ Supplier list of Operators and Other Industry Buyers for their Sourcing process. 2. Non-eligibility to obtain any contract from the Oil & Gas Operators and from Other Industry Buyers even if you win a bid. 3. Termination of all NBF and JSRS services. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal 4. Removal of your company data from the JSRS

. Removal of your company data from the JSRS. Our JSRS Certificate has already expired, and the grace period has lapsed as well. Can we still renew? You may but there is no guarantee that all your data is still with us. So please contact jsrsrenewal@businessgateways.com for the process of re-registering/renewing https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal

Business Gateways Support Portal Other Benefits on JSRS / Miscellaneous What is GCC Open Tenders Service? BGI in its endeavour to provide value-added services to its JSRS Suppliers, offers GCC Open Tenders Notifications from all Sectors across 6 GCC countries. Existing JSRS suppliers can subscribe to receive Open Tender Notifications from all 6 GCC countries. Suppliers can choose from a wide range of categories/sub- categories at amazing offers

. Free Subscription to GCC Open Tenders Service BGI is offering 3 Months Free Subscription to GCC Open Tenders Service to new Suppliers who have completed their payment and Tier 1 validation. A notification will be sent to the user with the offer details for free access to 1 tender category (including all related sub-categories) for 3 Months. if the Supplier has not availed this offer, then the offer will get elapsed exactly in 30 days from the received notification mail

. The Supplier must subscribe to GCC Open Tenders Service to receive access to more than 1 Tender Category. How do I subscribe to GCC Open Tenders through JSRS? Registered JSRS Suppliers can follow these steps to subscribe to GCC Open Tenders: Login to JSRS. Click Opportunities from the side menu, click on GCC Tenders and select a subscription pack. Choose the allowed number of Categories and Sub-Categories that support your business interests

. By default, the Categories and Sub-Categories are applicable to all 6 GCC Countries, however you may select specific GCC countries based on your preference. Generate the invoice and complete the payment (Online through Credit Card or Offline through bank transfer). Once your payment is approved, you will automatically begin receiving GCC Open Tender notifications. Assign the GCC Open Tender Service to the right user(s) in your company

. If you have queries regarding GCC Open Tender, kindly visit our FAQ or send us an enquiry. Non-JSRS Suppliers are kindly requested to register on JSRS if they wish to subscribe to GCC Open Tenders. Is the subscription fee for GCC Open Tenders billed monthly or annually? GCC Open Tenders Service – Subscription Packs start as low as USD 15/OMR 2 per month and is billed annually. If you have queries regarding GCC Open Tender, kindly send us an enquiry. https://support.businessgateways

. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/other-beneﬁts-on-jsrs What are the FREE subscriptions on market intelligence reports available for JSRS Suppliers? BGI has signed strategic alliances with Oxford Business Group (OBG) and The Energy Year (TEY) to deliver internationally acclaimed intelligence on markets based on sectors and countries. Our Suppliers gain free access to these online market reports published by OBG and TEY

. Read more on Online Market Reports Does JSRS provide B2B, Business Partnerships and other business opportunities beyond Oman? Suppliers can enhance their business opportunities by accessing the e-Marketplace known as the National Business Framework (NBF) a 'B2B stimulation' platform on JSRS. The NBF has thousands of companies across hundreds of countries and forms the foundation platform of the Oman Procurement system - JSRS

. Equipped with multiple proactive B2B tools, the NBF e-Marketplace is a simple way where users of a single company can connect with other related companies worldwide to foster Business Partnerships, Distribution Networks etc. It is also possible to subscribe to GCC Open Tenders to stay connected to opportunities within the entire GCC through this platform

. How many users from our company can be added to one JSRS profile? The JSRS profile enables you to add unlimited users per company on the platform. You can manage user rights through the Admin Panel of the Admin User. Will I receive tender opportunities via email, or do I have to frequently login to JSRS? All the tenders will be directly sent to your registered email Id depending on the requirements, provided you hold a valid JSRS Certificate*

. Suppliers must select their preferred sectors to receive email notification for enquires posted towards the sectors on JSRS -CMS. However, it is always recommended that you login to JSRS frequently to make sure you don’t miss out on any opportunities. Additionally, businessgateways provides value-added services to its JSRS Suppliers. The GCC Open Tenders Notifications Service from all sectors across 6 GCC countries, allows you to receive happening Tender Notifications directly in your JSRS

. Existing JSRS suppliers can subscribe to GCC Tenders Notification Service, to receive Open Tender Notifications from all 6 GCC countries. There is a wide range of categories / sub- categories to choose from, at affordable prices

. Read more *Supplier Certification Mandate The Oman Ministry of Energy & Minerals has recently Mandated, with effect from 1 July 2021, all Suppliers who participate in any bidding activities floated by the Oil & Gas Operators and Concession Companies, must hold an ACTIVE JSRS Certificate. Contractors and Suppliers who are awarded Contracts and POs must hold an ACTIVE JSRS Certificate during the entire tenure of the Contract

. How can we best we use the JSRS to gain more opportunities? How will I learn of employee requirements through JSRS If you update your products and services in detail, and tag them properly, your service will be seen by https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/other-beneﬁts-on-jsrs Procurement Officials who utilize the JSRS

.Proactively, we recommend you search for companies (for example in Construction) as per classification using theB2B tools on NBF and directly communicate your service to Large / SME companies in Oman. To know more about NBF, visit this https://businessgateways

.com/national-business-framework Are international EPCs, who have received a contract in Oman, obligated to send their enquiries for supply of Products or Services to JSRS registered companies? This depends on the Obligation Contract Terms & Conditions listed out by the Project Owner (Operator / Buyer) who has awarded the contract to the EPC

. Normally this is defined on the JSRS Contracts Management System, where if an SME/LCC Obligation has been set towards an awarded contract, the EPC is obligated to source eligible SME Companies, using JSRS. If the JSRS CMS access has been provided by the Project Owner to the EPC, they can also search for Omani Product & Services, listed. The JSRS Contracts Management System (JSRS-CMS), integrates Supplier Sourcing, eTendering,, Award & Tracking of the entire Project's/Contract's Supply Chain

. The Ministry of Energy and Minerals, Oman has Mandated the JSRS-CMS for Operators to monitor their sub- contracting activities. Other Project Owners and Contractors also use JSRS-CMS to enforce MSME/LCC Obligations. Kindly visit this link to learn more on JSRS-CMS: https://businessgateways.com/jsrs/jsrs-cms/ https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/other-beneﬁts-on-jsrs

Business Gateways Support Portal JSRS Registration/Certification Process & Subscription Fee details. How do we apply for JSRS Certification? A. Interested companies can register online on www.businessgateways.com. B. Upon submitting the JSRS Registration form, a confirmation mail will be sent to the registered company email ID. Note: Order confirmation is a ‘must’ to proceed further, so please confirm acceptance of the mail received from businessgateways. C

. C. On receipt of order confirmation, the Login credentials to JSRS shall be sent to your registered company email ID. D. Login and complete the JSRS Certification fee paymentprocess and update your company profile. F. JSRS Certification process involves: 1. Enterprise Admin 2. MCP (Master company Profile) 3. Supplier Profile 4. SCF (Supplier Certification Form) Tier 3 – Industry Certification by JSRS Buyers JSRS Certification Fee Structure Oman: 1

. Companies registering from Oman are subject to following fee structure, as per the Small and Medium Enterprise Development Authority(SMEDA). SME-Micro: OMR 50, SME-Small: OMR 100, SME-Medium: OMR 100, Large Companies: OMR 900. 2. The JSRS Certification Fees shown above are for a subscription period of Three Years. 3. Please note that your Company Classification is based on your Total Employee count & your Annual Sales Turnover. 4

. 4. Choose the right Classification during the Registration or your Certification process will be delayed due to the Classification change process during diligence check. Note: · JSRS Subscription Fee mentioned is excluding VAT of 5%. VAT charges are applicable only to Omani companies. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022 · JSRS Subscription Fee is exclusive of any payment processing charges that may be applicable

. To know more about the JSRS Subscription Fee refer to the Certification Fee tab in the Registration page. International: Option 1: USD 1,000 for One Year. Option 2: USD 2,250 for Three Years. Note: · JSRS Subscription Fee is exclusive of any payment processing charges that may be applicable. To know more about the JSRS Subscription Fee refer to the Certification Fee tab in the Registration page

. What are the modes of payment available? There are two modes of payment available on the JSRS Application: Online Payment Offline Payment Online Payment: The JSRS Certification fee can be paid online through the Payment Gateway of Bank Muscat hosted on the JSRS. You can also pay using Credit/Debit cards. It is important that your Credit/Debit Cards are '3D Secure' approved before it can be used on our system

. Offline Payment: The offline payment can be done via: Cheque or Cash Deposit Bank Transfer The JSRS Subscription Fee for International Company is relatively higher than the Fee for Omani Companies. Do you offer special rates/Subsidized rates for Micro or Small overseas companies The JSRS Subscription fee for Suppliers is set by the Ministry of Energy and Minerals, Oman and is based on the supplier origin (National or International)

. Further, in Oman, it is based on Company Classification (SME & Large) standards set by the Small and Medium Enterprise Development Authority(SMEDA). To know more about the JSRS Subscription Fee refer to the Certification Fee tab in the Registration page. https://support.businessgateways

. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022 What are the Pricing Policies for Suppliers? The Certification fee for suppliers is set by the Ministry of Energy and Minerals, Oman and the actual value is based on the supplier origin (National or International)

. For Omani companies, the employee count, and annual sales (revenue) are the deciding factors for the JSRS certification fee, and the company classification is as per Small and Medium Enterprise Development Authority(SMEDA) classification standards. Information regarding the current Supplier Fee and the Certification Duration is outlined on www.businessgateways.com. Do we need to pay separately for NBF and JSRS Platforms? No

. A single payment is enough to gain access to the NBF and JSRS Platforms. What is Tier 1 on JSRS? A. The Tier 1 of JSRS is an e-Marketplace (B2B) Platform initiative known as Oman National Business Framework. B. Suppliers are expected to ready their company profile here and are encouraged to use the critical B2B Tools that are available on this tier. C

. C. All Products and Services offered by the Suppliers are uploaded here through an exhaustive Catalogue Management System built using the JSRS Category Code - UNSPSC based, These Products and Services shall be Validated on SCF ( Supplier Certification Form) of JSRS. D. The NBF also supports bringing in multiple users from within each supplier organization for better collaboration and integration to the e-Marketplace. E

. E. Upon profile validation, suppliers can gain access to and network with thousands of credibility-verified companies across 95+ countries. F. Suppliers can subscribe for open tender notifications from all sectors of the 6 GCC countries. What is Tier 2 on JSRS? A. The JSRS Tier 2 Consists Buyers Community, JSRS Tenders, CMS (Contractors Management system) and Jsearch

. What is Tier 3 on JSRS? Joining the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS-CSN) on Tier-2 allows access to Additional Certifications/Pre-Qualification options for certain Buyer Community organizations. Tier-3 enables these organization-specific certifications but is currently available only to Omani companies meeting specific criteria. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022 https://support.businessgateways
.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022

Business Gateways Support Portal Products and Services What is the Coding Standard used for Products & Services? JSRS has been using the comprehensive coding standards of the United Nations Standards for Products & Services Code (UNSPSC) system for catalog management of all your Products and Services. With the release of the new JSRS, a new Coding system – JSRS Category Code (JCC) has been implemented

. The JCC is devised to: Improve the ease and effectiveness of mapping exact Products & Services within the Oil & Gas Industry Improve Search Engine Optimisation for effective Sourcing by the JSRS Buyers Community All existing UNSPSC based Products & Services are now mapped to the JCC Is there a limit to the number of Products & Services we can upload? No, there is no limit to the number of products and services a company can upload on its profile page

. However, we recommend that you frequently update your products and services page. Is the JSRS Certification related to specific Products & Services? Yes. The JSRS Certification is linked to specific products or services from under your products and services list, that are approved by businessgateways. It is advisable to add all your products or services to your JSRS Certificate since the more products and services you have approved, the more tendering opportunities your company will receive

. After Certification, can I add or remove the Certified Products? Yes, you can add or remove Products & Services on the JSRS Certificate. To add a Products & Services, the details need to be updated on the Supplier Profile (Tier 1) and all the relevant documents need to be updated. Supplier must add the Products & Services for JSRS Certification by using the Map Products & Services for JSRS Certification. The added Products & Services will be subject to a validation by BGI Backend team

. On successful validation, the Products & Services will be tagged as JSRS Certified https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/products-and-services Option to remove a Products & Services will be available under Action. How to view the approved products and services? The JSRS Certificate provides a feature to view the approved products and services of your company. Scan the QR code on your JSRS Certificate. https://support.businessgateways
. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/products-and-services

Business Gateways Support Portal JSRS Password Reset Procedure Go to the application: www.businessgateways.com/jsrs or use the JSRS Mobile application Click on LOGIN button Click on Forgot Password Enter your Email ID or Username or Mobile Number. You can click on the link provided in your email to change the password provided you have given your correct Email ID (or) Enter the OTP that is received on your email Enter the NEW PASSWORD and CONFIRM PASSWORD

. Click SET PASSWORD Note: Your Password Should contain Minimum 8 characters One uppercase One number One special character Note: At present, only the Web Application is LIVE. The Mobile Applications will be launched at a later date. https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-password-reset-procedure
